description: A love-forever classic, this murcia bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height: 27 cm Width: 39 cm Depth: 10 cm Soft, supple leatherette upper Fabric lining Buckle detail on the front and sides Brand badge on the front Zippered pocket on the back Two main zippered compartments with two pouches in the first compartment and a zippered pocket in the second Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
